title: Weather Alerts via SMS
goal: I want to build a service that fetches weather data for a user’s location and sends real-time weather alerts via SMS.

title: Nearby Restaurant Finder + Reservation
goal: Build a service that uses a user’s location to discover restaurants, show reviews, and offer reservations via email.

title: Cybersecurity Alert System
goal: Create a dashboard that checks domains for threats using threat intelligence APIs and sends alerts to admins via SMS.

title: Travel Planner with Tourist Spots
goal: Design a travel app that books flights, suggests hotels, shows top-rated local attractions, and displays weather info.

title: Stock Analyzer + Buy/Sell Alerts
goal: Build a tool that tracks stock prices, analyzes trends using ML, and emails buy/sell signals to users.

title: Event Finder with Calendar Sync
goal: Build a service that finds local events based on interests and syncs selected ones to the user’s Google Calendar.

title: News Summarizer with SMS Briefing
goal: Build a service that fetches top news articles, summarizes them into an SMS-ready digest using an LLM/text-summarization API, and sends the digest via SMS on a daily schedule.

title: Price Tracker for eCommerce Products
goal: Build a bot that tracks product prices across multiple eCommerce platforms and sends alerts when prices drop.

title: Online Course Recommendation Assistant
goal: Create an education assistant that searches university and course information, retrieves available course or class details from learning APIs, and sends enrollment reminder emails.

title: Gym Finder with Booking
goal: Build a service that finds nearby fitness or appointment-based venues, retrieves available appointment slots using a scheduling API, and creates a booking for a selected session.

title: Loan Simulator with Email Report
goal: Build a service that fetches current interest rates, calculates a repayment schedule and loan summary using a loan/amortization API, and sends the loan report using an email API.

title: Content Safety Filter for Web Links
goal: Build a service that checks a web link by validating its domain, scanning the URL for malware or phishing risk, checking adult-content risk, and returning the scan results for downstream blocking.

title: Retail Promotions via Geo-Fencing
goal: Build a retail promotions service that detects when a user enters a shopping area, retrieves active coupon links, and sends selected coupon offers by SMS.

title: Social Media Topic Tracker
goal: Design a system that tracks trending hashtags, top influencers, and returns a daily engagement summary.

title: Delivery Status Tracker with Email Updates
goal: Create a logistics tool that fetches parcel tracking data, predicts ETA, and emails the customer when status changes.
